name: claim-pending-in-transaction
description: MessagesRepo.claimPendingForRun runs listPending+markDelivered inside db.transaction((tx)=>...) so two concurrent turns on the same burrow can't deliver the same row twice. Recovery sweep handles spawn failure: any 'delivered' row whose run never reaches terminal is reset to 'unread'.

content: Spawn-per-turn vs one-shot is detected via AgentRuntime.encodeInboxMessage (claude-code/sapling implement it; codex omits it). isSpawnPerTurn(rt) keys off 'typeof rt.encodeInboxMessage === function'. CLI uses this to warn at 'burrow send' time that messages on a one-shot agent queue for the next *run* not the next turn (SPEC §13.3).

name: src/inbox layout (V1)
description: src/inbox/inbox.ts: Inbox class — public library facade (send/list/pending/cancel/count/claimForRun) atop MessagesRepo. Validates burrow.state==='active' on send. src/inbox/injector.ts: prepareTurnInjection({inbox,registry,burrowId,runId,agentId}) -> {runtime, messages, deferred}. Run loop calls this immediately before runtime.buildSpawnCommand to populate SpawnContext.pendingMessages.
